findings.description: The source h2 section「後方互換性ポリシー」contains 3 h3 subsections（後方互換性を維持する範囲、後方互換性維持の内容、後方互換性の例外）and has well over 2000 chars of plain text, but the knowledge file consolidates all of them into a single section s4 without splitting. Per the validation rule, an h2 with ≥2000 chars of plain text and existing h3 subsections should be split.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings: 「後方互換性を維持する範囲」、「後方互換性維持の内容」、「後方互換性の例外」 — all three are merged into s4 in the knowledge file.
